heading: Authority to make grants for purposes of Naval Sea Cadet Corps
label: 8761b Authority to make grants for purposes of Naval Sea Cadet Corps
text: Subject to the availability of funds for this purpose, the Secretary of the Navy may make grants to support the purposes of Naval Sea Cadet Corps, a federally chartered corporation under chapter 1541 of title 36.
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 7541b of this title

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019
